ModMetaData.name: RimDoctor
ModMetaData.author: itygr
ModMetaData.description:
RimDoctor v1.0.3 — a smart in-game mod manager + load/texture/log doctor.
• Prevents missing-texture crashes at runtime by substituting a generated placeholder for any texture that fails to load. • Reads the live error log and explains it in plain language — what it means, the likely culprit mod, and a suggested fix. • Scans for broken content (missing textures, bad def paths, incomplete mod downloads) and shows a clear health report. • Live performance analytics: TPS/FPS, ms-per-tick, memory/GC, and per-mod tick attribution (which mods cost you ticks), plus an optional compact on-screen overlay. • Startup load-weight and save/world bloat analytics, broken down by mod. • Suggests a dependency-aware load order (read-only) and repairs problems via a generated local override mod — never by editing Workshop files.
Changelog v1.0.3 — Fixed the in-game RimDoctor tab not appearing (the packaged release was missing its Defs folder). The tab and version now show in-game. v1.0.2 — Log window is now OPT-IN (off by default): it no longer auto-pops on every error, which fixes the intrusive UI and audio interruption reported on large mod packs. Removed the auto-apply load-order sort (it could overwrite your modlist). Minor startup fixes.
RimDoctor fails safe: if it errors, it disables the affected feature and never blocks the game from loading.
